event_title: August 2012 San Francisco Hadoop User Meetup
title: August 2012 San Francisco Hadoop User Meetup
description: The August Hadoop meetup will be held Wednesday, August 8, from 6:00pm to 8:00pm. This meetup will be hosted by Splunk at 250 Brannan St., San Francisco, CA. As usual, we will use the discussion-based "unconference" format. At the beginning of the meetup we will collaboratively construct an agenda consisting of several discussion breakout groups. All participants may propose a topic and volunteer to facilitate a discussion. All Hadoop-related topics are encouraged, and all members of the Hadoop community are welcome. Event schedule: 6:00pm - Welcome 6:30pm - Introductions; start creating agenda Breakout sessions begin as soon as we're ready 8:00pm - Conclusion Food and refreshments will be provided courtesy of Splunk.
